_comment: Pre-relaxed for NestJS build. Extends @wellmade/tsconfig/node.json. Use for `tsconfig.json` in a Nest service; pair with `nestjs-spec.json` for `tsconfig.spec.json`. The overrides below are documented in the package README — each is a flag Nest cannot run with at its node.json/base.json default. Project-specific paths (outDir, rootDir, baseUrl) and policy choices (sourceMap, declaration) are left to the consumer.
